degraded.detail: classify_complexity flagged touches_auth from the word 'session' in 'single_session' / 'phase-runner subagent' — a message-keyword match, not the diff. The diff touches no auth/RLS/middleware code (orchestrator loop lib + CLI + skill prose + tests). Overridden; F11 recomputes risk flags from the real diff.

F0 verification ran the shipwright-run plugin suite (241) + integration-tests (176) + ruff@0.15.15 + leak-guard f0 ALLOW. The change is isolated to plugins/shipwright-run + docs; the full shared/tests + all-plugin suite runs in CI on the PR.

surface_verification.justification: SS3 is a Python orchestrator-loop lib (orchestrator_pkg/single_session_loop.py + single_session_cli.py) + two CLI subcommands + SKILL/reference prose + docs. No web/UI/API surface, no server, no client code. run_config is only READ in the loop (all mutation via phase_task_lifecycle); no message-contract change, so the Backend-affects-Frontend rule does not apply. The CLI surface was exercised END-TO-END as the composition proof: integration-tests/test_single_session_pipeline.py drives single-session-next / single-session-apply through a full pipeline (project to the final phase incl. serial build split fan-out) to a complete run, plus the forced-failure strict-stop path. Verification = F0 pytest (241 run-plugin + 176 integration) + ruff + leak-guard f0 ALLOW.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 — full pipeline incl. build fan-out advances in ONE loop on a fixture
AC2 — forced phase failure strict-stops via mark_phase_failed, no successor appended
AC3 — the loop composes with the lifecycle helpers end-to-end
behaviors.evidence: integration-tests/test_single_session_pipeline.py (drives via the real orchestrator.py CLI, reusing phase_task_lifecycle) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC4 — no direct run_config mutation (all writes via the lifecycle)
resolve guards mode / no-config / terminal signals (wrong_mode, no_config, complete, failed, needs_validation)
next claims the frontier + records loop_state; re-dispatch is idempotent
design completion freezes splits BEFORE planning so build fans out per split
a malformed phase-runner result never reaches the lifecycle (no mutation)
behaviors.evidence: test_apply_invalid_result_never_reaches_lifecycle PASSED (task stays in_progress, run stays in_progress)

behaviors.behavior: a stale CAS token is rejected fail-closed and leaves the loop pointer untouched
AC5 — end-to-end UAT on a real idea
behaviors.reason: Human acceptance of a real end-to-end pipeline run on a real idea; also depends on SS4's phase-runner subagent. Tracked as a NEEDS-YOU follow-up in the iterate spec.
